task_completion.description: Navigate to the Print Format window
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Print Format' window or tab is open in the iDempiere application.

task_completion.description: Base the new format on the existing 'Standard Order' format
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Copy From' dialog, process window, or search screen showing 'Standard Order' being selected as the source to duplicate or copy.

task_completion.description: Name the new Print Format 'Customer Proposal'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' field in the Print Format window is filled with 'Customer Proposal' for the Order (C_Order) table.

task_completion.description: Change the header title text to 'PROPOSAL'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Format Item' tab or window, a header/title item has its 'Print Name' or 'Name' field changed to 'PROPOSAL'.

task_completion.description: Hide the 'Line No' column from the printed document
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Format Item' tab, the record for 'Line' or 'Line No' has its 'Printed' checkbox unchecked (empty).

integrity.description: Agent used the iDempiere web GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the iDempiere web interface (menus, tabs, checkboxes) rather than terminal commands or SQL scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual ERP application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the genuine iDempiere ERP interface, not a text editor, mock UI, or local HTML file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows running psql or other database clients are visible executing UPDATE/INSERT statements on AD_PrintFormat or AD_PrintFormatItem.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task takes place in iDempiere. The target table is 'C_Order' (Order). The source format to copy is 'Standard Order'. The new format must be named 'Customer Proposal'. The header text must be changed to 'PROPOSAL'. The column to hide is named 'Line' or 'Line No'. In iDempiere, hiding a column in a print format is achieved by navigating to the 'Format Item' tab for the specific print format, selecting the 'Line' item, and unchecking the 'Printed' checkbox.
